output: Batch T10 validation completed. Fixed the Sprint 6 full-suite regression by making checklist additions without explicit positions append after existing checklist items in both SQLite and Supabase stores. Targeted Sprint 6 tests pass, the throwaway mocked reproduction script passed after the fix and was deleted, and full pytest was rerun. Full pytest still fails only on the known pre-existing `.megaplan` deleted-file `FileNotFoundError` in `tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py`; Sprint 6 tests pass in the full run.
commands_run: rg -n "def seed_checklist|def list_checklist_items|checklist" agent_kit/store/sqlite.py agent_kit/tools/editorial.py tests/test_editorial_loop.py
rg -n "def add_checklist_items|position" agent_kit/store/supabase.py tests/test_supabase_store.py tests/test_supabase_adapters.py tests/test_sqlite_store.py
python -m pytest tests/test_supabase_store.py tests/test_supabase_adapters.py tests/test_sqlite_store.py tests/test_sqlite_store_v1b.py
deviations: Bare `pytest tests/test_image_tools.py tests/test_second_opinion.py` uses Python 3.8 in this environment and fails during collection on modern type syntax before executing tests. Validation continued with `python -m pytest` on Python 3.11.11.

The temporary reproduction script initially used a persistent path by mistake and created a repo-local SQLite file named `None`; that throwaway artifact was removed, the script was corrected to use a temporary directory, rerun successfully, and deleted.

Full `python -m pytest` still fails only on the known pre-existing `tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py` `FileNotFoundError` for deleted `.megaplan/plans/sprint-3-multi-epic/execution_batch_10.json`; final run result was 185 passed, 2 skipped, 1 failed.
